system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dondathang_htr_print","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DONDATHANG_HTR_Print]
( 
	@SoDonHang nvarchar(200)
)
AS
BEGIN

    SELECT 
		 a.loaiddh
	    , CASE
		 WHEN lan_sua > 0 THEN CONCAT(a.maddh, N' (Chỉnh sửa lần ', lan_sua, ')')
		 ELSE a.maddh
		 END AS maddh
	    , A.mancc
	    , A.tenncc
	    , SUBSTRING(b.chitiet, 2, CHARINDEX('_', b.chitiet)) AS banve
	    , b.chitiet
	    , d.tenvt
	    , d.mota AS tenchitiet
	    , d.dvt
	    , b.soluong
	    , b.dongia
	    , b.thanhtien
	    , ISNULL(b.loaitien, D.loaitien) AS loaitien
	    , a.loaithanhtoan
	    , ngaydat
	    , ngaygiao
	    , b.ghichu
	    , b.donhang
	    , a.lan_sua
	    , b.id
    INTO #DONDATHANG
    FROM   tr_dondathang a, 
		 tr_dondathang_chitiet b, 
		 tr_material d
    WHERE  a.maddh = b.maddh
		 AND b.chitiet = ISNULL(d.idxuong, d.mavt)
		 AND a.trangthai <> -1 --0: Hủy, 1: Đang mở, 2: Nhập một phần, 3: Đã nhập hàng
		and a.pheduyet = '1'
		AND d.xoa = 'N'
		 AND A.loaiddh = 'HTR'
		 AND a.maddh = @SoDonHang
    ORDER BY B.id;

    SELECT 
		 a.loaiddh 
	    , CASE
		 WHEN LEN(a.banve) > 2 THEN LEFT(A.banve, LEN(A.BANVE) - 2)
		 END AS banve
	    , a.maddh
	    , A.mancc
	    , A.tenncc AS vendor_name
	    , B.address
	    , B.phone
	    , B.email
	    , A.chitiet
	    , a.tenvt
	    , A.tenchitiet
	    , A.dvt
	    , A.soluong
	    , A.dongia
	    , A.thanhtien
	    , A.loaitien
	    , ISNULL(a.loaithanhtoan, 0) AS loaithanhtoan
	    , A.ngaydat
	    , A.ngaygiao
	    , a.ghichu
	    , a.donhang
	    , a.lan_sua
    FROM   #DONDATHANG AS A
		 LEFT JOIN tr_nhacc AS B
		 ON A.mancc = B.vendor_id
    ORDER BY a.id
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_nhacc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
